brief_summary: Three-card kit layout. Left card (coral accent) shows Origin TKL Base at $99 USD with Katakana alphas and nav cluster. Centre card (muted) shows Roman Base at $125 USD with Latin alphas. Right card (muted) shows Precision Kit at $25 USD for Katakana numpad. A bottom note bar states that R1's all-in base was $129 and R2's entry price is $30 lower.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'Kitting and pricing' — 'The Origin TKL base ($99) leads with Katakana legends on the alpha and navigation rows.'
gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'Kitting and pricing' — 'The Roman Base ($125) covers buyers who want the colorway without the Katakana alphas.'
gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'Kitting and pricing' — 'numpad coverage is handled by the separate Precision Kit at $25.'
gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'Kitting and pricing' — 'R1 ran a single base kit at $129 USD with numpad included.'
